name: Match Dot Puzzle Game
description: Match Dot Puzzle Game is a fun, relaxing, and brain-training puzzle game designed for players of all ages. In this game, your goal is to match colorful dots by connecting them in the correct way. Each level presents a new challenge that tests your logic, focus, and problem-solving skills. This dot puzzle game is easy to play but becomes more challenging as you progress. With smooth controls and clean visuals, players can enjoy a calm yet engaging puzzle experience. The simple design makes it perfect for casual players, while the increasing difficulty keeps puzzle lovers entertained for hours.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
